content.en:
Soon after, the members of the Source God Pavilion received a summons that the Origin God Pavilion had given birth to the Thirteenth Ancestor.

And when they learned that the thirteenth ancestor was Ye Tian of the Nine Supreme Realm, they were all puzzled, and even dissatisfied, whether any of the twelve ancestors had opened a back door for Ye Tian and deliberately made Ye Tian the thirteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion.

Although the Source God Pavilion was just an idle force, such an act would also make them very angry.

However, some half-step Eternal Realms seized the opportunity, and they felt that if they applied for a challenge at this time, to apply to become the fourteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion, they might be able to pass.

Therefore, six half-step Eternal Realms in a row applied to become the fourteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion.

Obviously, they felt that Ye Tian's strength was weak, as long as they could hold on to Ye Tian's hands for an hour, or even defeat Ye Tian, then they could become the fourteenth ancestor.

"It's funny, some people even think that the Endless Ancestor is very weak, and they want to take this opportunity to apply to become the Fourteenth Ancestor!"

The True River Sword Ancestor smiled.

However, these half-step Eternal Realm applications, he naturally couldn't refuse.

So, he agreed to the application of these six half-step Eternal Realms.

......

The first half-step Eternal Realm is here.

"I've seen the Thirteen Ancestors!"

The half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, the Eternal Night Origin Ancestor, said respectfully.

"Eternal Night Ancestor, a long time ago, you applied to challenge the Thirteenth Ancestor, you know the rules, start choosing. True River Sword Ancestor spoke.

The Eternal Night Origin Ancestor smiled slightly: "I know that I am not the opponent of the Twelve Ancestors, and it is difficult to hold on for an hour without falling behind, so I will choose one, and that is the Thirteenth Ancestor Endless Ancestor." "

Anyway, you only need to hold on to the hands of a thirteen ancestor for an hour without losing the wind to win, so you can choose Ye Tian, you don't have to choose again.

"Rules are rules, and they must be chosen!"

True River Sword Ancestor said solemnly.

"Okay!"

The Eternal Night Origin Ancestor casually chose two Twelve Ancestors, and the assessment began.

The Eternal Night Origin Ancestor was also preparing to defeat Ye Tian, dreaming of becoming the Fourteenth Ancestor of the Source God Pavilion.

However, as soon as he fought, Ye Tian's Shattered Void Sword completely injured him.

In the blink of an eye, the Eternal Night Origin Ancestor was not lightly injured.

"I throw in the towel!"

The Eternal Night Source Ancestor immediately said.

"There are two more, continue to assess!"

True River Sword Ancestor said.

However, as soon as the remaining two Twelve Ancestors appeared, the Eternal Night Source Ancestor immediately admitted defeat, not wanting to fight at all, or not wanting to continue to lose face.

He just wanted to leave immediately, otherwise it would be too embarrassing.

After the Eternal Night Origin Ancestor left, the other five half-step Eternal Realms were assessed one after another, but they were all defeated by Ye Tian.

After that, the inner members of the Source God Pavilion all knew that Ye Tian's strength was stronger than them, so they naturally didn't dare to ridicule it, and they also recognized Ye Tian's status.

Moreover, they also knew very well that Ye Tian's potential in the future would inevitably be above the other twelve ancestors.

After all, Ye Tian is only in the Ninefold Supreme Realm now, if he becomes a half-step Eternal Realm, wouldn't that strength be comparable to the existence of the Extreme Realm?

Of course, there are some demons who are against the sky, they are very demonic at the beginning, but in the end, they can't break through to the half-step eternal realm, and this situation also exists.

Therefore, if one day is not as good as a half-step Eternal Realm, it will not be able to enter the eyes of those who are truly strong.

This is also the reason why Ye Tian was able to fight beyond the level, but no one was afraid of him, and the Eternal Realm, which was high up, didn't even pay attention to him.

-------------------

Yuanshen Pavilion, the most central space, a spacious room.

The Thirteen Ancestors sat on chairs like ordinary people, around a table, which was filled with all kinds of rare fruit resources.

Everyone was eating and chatting, as if it didn't look like a half-step Eternal Realm existence at all.

Ye Tian also quickly integrated into such an atmosphere, what did everyone say.

"Everyone, I have become the thirteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion, I don't know if I can know some secrets?" Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Ancestor, if you want to know anything, just ask, if we know it, and if it doesn't involve our own secrets, we will tell you!"

"I'm more interested in the existence of the Eternal Realm, why can't I look down on the Eternal Realm in the Source Sea, could it be that the Eternal Realm exists in an area outside the Source Sea? But the Source Sea seems to be endless, and there are no records and legends in other places. "

Ye Tian asked this question.

"Hahahaha!!!" Feng Gu Origin Ancestor said with a smile: "Endless Ancestor, I also guessed that you would ask this question, in fact, many Supreme Beings and even some weaker half-step Eternal Realms will also be curious about this, this is not too top-secret information, you can tell you okay." "

"The source sea is indeed endless, and the source sea is surrounded by the extension of space-time projection, which can be said to be a place outside the source sea, or it can be said to be a part of the source sea. If the Source Sea is compared to a main world, and there are many small worlds around the main world, and although the area of some small worlds is not as large as the main world, the resources and cultivation environment contained in them are even better than the main world. "

"Yes, the source sea seems to be the origin of everything, but it is still restricted in the dark, which makes it difficult to change here, and those space-time territories around the source sea are diverse, not as eternal as the source sea. Those space-time territories will even give birth to various precious treasure resources, which are conducive to the cultivation and development of the Eternal Realm. If some space-time territories have been developed for a long time, more top powerhouses have been born than Yuanhai. For example, in the Source Sea, the Polar Realm is relatively rare, but some space-time territories have a lot of Extreme Realm. "

"Of course, the source sea has an advantage, that is, the innate eternal rules are complete, only the source sea can truly give birth to the half-step eternal realm of the nine-pole realm level, and the space-time territory can only give birth to the eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm powerhouse at the highest. "

"Therefore, it is even possible that other Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses in the space-time territory may even enter the Source Sea at a huge cost in order to impact the Nine Extremes Realm. But there are a few demons that can really break through to the Nine Extremes Realm, and we don't know very well. "

"Almost all Eternal Realm beings are in charge of a space-time territory, so they are also called lords. There is a huge source sea film between the source sea and the space-time territory, which cannot be broken unless the Eternal Realm lord, so we half-step Eternal Realm can't leave the Source Sea and go to those space-time territories, unless it is a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Nine Extremes Realm and forcibly tear the source sea film to come to those space-time territories. "

"In the same way, if the half-step Eternal Realm of the space-time territory wants to come over, it has to ask the Eternal Realm for help. "

When the Twelve Ancestors finished speaking, Ye Tian roughly understood this secret.

"I know that if you want to become an Eternal Realm, you must merge with the Eternal Rules, so why is it difficult for the Extreme Realm powerhouses to break through to the Eternal Realm?

Ye Tian asked this question.

Many supreme beings know that the stronger the strength of the half-step Eternal Realm, it does not necessarily mean that the hope of breaking through to the Eternal Realm is greater, and many strong people who have broken through to the Eternal Realm have never stepped into the Extreme Realm.

Therefore, he was puzzled by this question and has not yet figured it out.

At this time, the True River Sword Ancestor and the others sighed.

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor said: "Because of the innate eternal rules, the Endless Ancestor, you have also comprehended the innate eternal rules, we have sensed it." "

"Yes, it's not a good thing to comprehend the innate eternal rules, it means that you have a deeper control over the rules!" Ye Tian said.

"No!" True River Sword Ancestor shook his head and explained, "If you only comprehend the Eternal Rules, but not the Innate Eternal Rules, then you only need to fuse the Eternal Rules to advance to the Eternal Realm. But once you accidentally realize the innate eternal rules, then you can't fuse the ordinary eternal rules, you have to fuse the innate eternal rules before you can be promoted to the eternal realm, which is the reason why it is difficult for the powerhouses of the extreme realm to break through to the eternal realm. "

"What, you have to fuse the Innate Eternal Rules before you can be promoted to the Eternal Realm?"

It was the first time Ye Tian learned of such a secret.

"Endless Ancestor, this secret must not be publicized, it is a rule formulated by the Eternal Realm!" the True River Sword Ancestor reminded, lest Ye Tian leak it out.

"Why do you hide this secret?" Ye Tian wondered.

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor guessed: "There may be two reasons, the first reason is that I don't want to give birth to more Eternal Realms, many geniuses originally had great hopes of being promoted to Eternal Realm, but they all comprehended the innate eternal rules because they didn't know this secret, which made it many times more difficult to break through." But it is also possible that this is not the reason, because although the Eternal Realm restricts our transmission, it does not completely prohibit it, nor does it allow us to make a vow. Therefore, it is also possible that the second reason is also possible. "

"The second reason is that the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm also hope to give birth to more Eternal Realms that have been promoted to the Extreme Realm, so that the Eternal Realm has greater potential, a higher future prospect, and can leapfrog to a higher level. "

"Endless Ancestor, you have comprehended the Innate Eternal Rules, so you must also be promoted to the Extreme Realm, and then fuse the Innate Eternal Rules before you can be promoted to the Eternal Realm. "

Ye Tian suddenly realized, but he was not panicked in his heart, he was very confident in himself, and he would definitely be able to merge with the innate eternal rules and thus be promoted to the eternal realm.

Next, Ye Tian and the other twelve ancestors kept chatting, and they learned more and more secrets.

Abrupt.

The True River Sword Ancestor proposed, "In a little while, the Traceless Territory will be opened, and we are going to go again this time." "
